_comment: Add this block inside the 'mcpServers' object in your Claude Desktop config.

gpt-image-mcp-stdio._comment: Option A: Run as a local Bun subprocess (stdio transport)

gpt-image-mcp-azure-stdio._comment: Option B: Azure OpenAI via stdio

gpt-image-mcp-docker-http._comment: Option C: Connect to a running Docker container (HTTP transport) — requires mcp-remote or a proxy
gpt-image-mcp-docker-http._note: Claude Desktop does not natively support remote HTTP MCP servers. Use mcp-remote: https://github.com/geelen/mcp-remote
